metadata.title:
HO 7 NE WS
That Has NOT Happened Yet

pages.raw_text:
Gas company has decided to cut
it's rate, owing to high cost of liv-
ing and great sympathy for the
long-suffering public.


James J. Hill announced that he
has decided to keep his promise
made many years ago, and have
the Great Northern grant terminal
rates to Spokane.


SYRACUSE, N. Y. Sept. ~
Theodore Roosevelt. at the conven-
tion here. endorsed in unqualified
terms Taft's administration, and
urged the reelection of Speaker
Cannon.


Acting Chief of Police Sullivan
sent out cards of invitation for n
little house party tonight, at which
the guests of honor will be the ex-
ecutive committee of the |. w. w.


The first delegation of IS who
filed their candidacy for member
ship in the charter revision com
mittee expressed themselves as
very gratified at SO many other
filings today.


But. remember, 1t hasn't hap
pened YETI
